featureSections.title: Transparent Communication and Fair Pricing

bullets: Detailed invoices with part and labor breakdowns

servicesPage.intro: At Colombia Auto Repair, we offer a full range of auto repair and maintenance services for all makes and models. Our experienced technicians use advanced diagnostics and quality parts to keep your vehicle running at its best.

services.title: Brake Repair and Replacement
services.shortDescription: Expert brake services to ensure your safety on the road.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are the most critical safety system on your vehicle. We inspect, repair, and replace brake pads, rotors, calipers, and more. Using premium parts and precise adjustments, we restore stopping power and peace of mind.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We thoroughly inspect brake pads, rotors, calipers, lines, and fluid.

process.title: Repair/Replace
process.description: Worn components are replaced with high-quality parts and properly adjusted.

process.title: Test Drive
process.description: We road-test the vehicle to ensure smooth and quiet braking.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000 to 70,000 miles depending on driving habits and vehicle type.

faqs.question: What are signs of brake trouble?
faqs.answer: Squealing, grinding, vibration, or a soft brake pedal indicate it's time for an inspection.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics and Repair
services.shortDescription: Accurate diagnostics and reliable engine repairs.
services.longDescription: When your check engine light comes on or performance declines, our advanced diagnostic tools pinpoint the issue quickly. From sensor replacements to major engine overhauls, we provide efficient and lasting repairs.

process.title: Scan
process.description: We connect diagnostic equipment to read error codes and live data.

process.title: Analyze
process.description: Our technician interprets data to identify the root cause of the problem.

process.title: Repair
process.description: We perform necessary repairs using quality parts and test the system.

faqs.question: What does the check engine light mean?
faqs.answer: It can indicate anything from a loose gas cap to a serious engine issue. We recommend a diagnostic scan.

faqs.question: How long does an engine diagnostic take?
faqs.answer: Typically 30 minutes to an hour, depending on the complexity.

services.title: Oil Changes and Routine Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Keep your engine healthy with regular oil changes.
services.longDescription: Regular oil changes are the simplest way to extend the life of your engine. We use high-quality oils and filters to protect your engine and maintain performance. We also offer multi-point inspections to catch issues early.

process.title: Drain Old Oil
process.description: We drain the old oil and replace the oil filter.

process.title: Refill
process.description: We add the correct grade and amount of fresh oil.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We check fluid levels, belts, hoses, and tire pressure.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Every 3,000 to 5,000 miles for conventional oil, or up to 7,500 for synthetic.

faqs.question: What type of oil does my car need?
faqs.answer: We recommend the manufacturer's specified viscosity, often 5W-30 or 0W-20.

services.title: AC and Heating System Repair
services.longDescription: A malfunctioning AC or heater can make driving miserable. We diagnose and repair all climate control systems, from refrigerant leaks to blower motor failures. We ensure your system blows cold in summer and warm in winter.

process.title: System Inspection
process.description: We check refrigerant levels, compressor, condenser, and hoses.

process.title: Leak Detection
process.description: We use UV dye and electronic detectors to find leaks.

process.title: Repair and Recharge
process.description: We repair components and recharge the system to manufacturer specs.

faqs.question: Why is my AC blowing warm air?
faqs.answer: Usually due to low refrigerant from a leak or a faulty compressor.

faqs.question: How often should I service my AC?
faqs.answer: Every 2-3 years or if you notice reduced cooling.

about.headline: Your Trusted Auto Repair Shop in Dallas, TX
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair services that keep our customers safe and satisfied.
story: Colombia Auto Repair was founded with a simple mission: deliver expert auto repair with integrity. Our team of certified technicians has decades of combined experience serving the Dallas community. We invest in the latest diagnostic tools and ongoing training to ensure every repair is done right.

We treat every customer like a neighbor, explaining repairs in plain language and offering fair, transparent pricing. Whether it's a simple oil change or a complex engine repair, we take pride in getting you back on the road safely. Our reputation is built on trust, quality, and reliability.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always recommend only necessary repairs and provide upfront pricing.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-tier parts and follow manufacturer specifications.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: Your satisfaction is our priority; we listen and communicate clearly.

coreValues.title: Expertise
coreValues.description: Continuous training and advanced tools keep us at the forefront of auto repair.

contact.headline: Get In Touch
contact.subheadline: We're here to help with all your auto repair needs.
